message:
feat(storage): add plan_hash binding to approval tokens (schema v19)

Extend approval_tokens table with plan-aware authorization fields:
- plan_hash: SHA-256 hash of the bound ActionPlan for scoped approval
- plan_version: schema version of the plan format
- risk_summary: human-readable risk description for audit/display

Adds migration v19 with indexed lookup on plan_hash for efficient
token retrieval by bound plan. Includes reversible down migration.

Updates ApprovalTokenRecord struct with corresponding optional fields.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
